name: React Router baseline
description: Modular AppRouter component plus Home and NotFound pages — wire into main.tsx with <AppRouter />.
notes: Install: npm i react-router-dom. Replace your <App /> render in main.tsx with <AppRouter />, or import AppRouter inside your existing App component. A catch-all route renders the NotFound page so refresh-on-deep-link works once you also apply vite-vercel-client-routing.
